ObbyWikiHomePageTitle.description: The title of the page to replace with the custom home page.

ObbyWikiHomePageCacheTTL.description: Cache TTL in seconds for the home page HTML. Set to 0 to disable caching. Default is 900 (15 minutes).

ObbyWikiHomePageFeaturedPages.description: An array of specific page titles to feature in the highlight carousel instead of automatically fetching them.

ObbyWikiHomePageDiscourseAnnouncementsJs.description: Discourse JSON URL for tagged announcements (category + tag). Leave empty to hide the announcements section.

ObbyWikiHomePageDiscourseFetchPrimaryTop.description: If true, perform one extra GET /t/{id}.json for the featured announcement only (first post text + author). Other topics use list excerpts only. Set false if the forum is slow or unreachable so the home page depends only on the tag list request.
